description_long: This object is a rectangular terrain model featuring a detailed topographic landscape with a mix of hills, valleys, and flat agricultural fields. The surface is covered with a high-resolution satellite or aerial image, showing a patchwork of green, brown, and tan areas representing forests, farmland, and open land. There are no visible structures, vehicles, or urban features, but the terrain includes subtle elevation changes and natural landforms. The edges of the model are sharply defined, and a scale bar and north arrow are present, indicating its use as a geographic or cartographic reference. The coloration and texture suggest a rural or semi-rural environment, with clear demarcations between different land uses. The model appears to be made from a solid base material with a printed or projected image on top.
description: A rectangular terrain model with detailed topography and a patchwork of rural land uses, covered by a high-resolution aerial image. The surface shows hills, valleys, and fields, with a scale bar and north arrow for reference.
description_view_0: The terrain model is viewed from the front, showing the north arrow and scale bar on the right, with hills and fields extending into the distance.
description_view_1: From this side view, the subtle elevation changes and undulating landscape are more apparent, with the scale bar visible on the left edge.
description_view_2: The rear view highlights the darker, forested hills at the far end, with the north arrow now on the left and the patchwork of fields in the foreground.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the varied terrain, with prominent hills on the right and a mix of agricultural plots across the surface.
attribute_tail_design: Not applicable; no tail structure present.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not applicable; no landing gear visible.
